title: Fiber Flow
description: Schema for Fiber Flow JSON — the format consumed by FBT (builder) and FBRE (render engine). As of @sonata-innovations/fiber-types v2, the TS-side Component is a discriminated union keyed on `type`; the on-disk JSON is unchanged.

screens.description: Ordered list of screens in the flow.

calculations.description: Top-level calculations. Each defines a named formula that references component values, option metadata, or other calculations.

colorScheme.description: Built-in palette preset that seeds the token layer. Default 'light'. Replaces the former 'darkMode' boolean (darkMode:true -> colorScheme:'dark').

surface.description: Raised surface: input fills, cards, popups (--fbre-surface). Derives hover/alt/subtle surfaces and input fills.

radius.description: Corner radius as a CSS length (--fbre-radius), e.g. '3px'.

style.description: Visual style for form elements. Standard mode styles: 'clean' = bottom-border inputs with uppercase labels (default). 'outlined' = full-border inputs with normal-case labels. 'refined-clean' = animated underline focus with left-accent groups. 'airy-clean' = spacious layout with tinted focus and pill buttons. 'soft-outlined' = full-border 8px radius with shadow-ring focus. 'defined-outlined' = filled-background inputs with top-accent groups. Conversational mode styles: 'centered-minimal' = thin underline inputs, bordered option cards, uppercase labels. 'stacked-cards' = filled background cards with left accent, keyboard shortcut badges. 'soft-float' = pill-shaped options with shadow lift on hover. 'bold-statement' = heavy borders, bold typography, inverted selection. Each style has a default stepper visual (see stepperStyle).

transition.description: Screen transition animation type. Absent or 'none' means instant swap.

allowInvalidTransition.description: Allow navigating forward even when the screen has validation errors.

show.description: Show built-in next/back navigation buttons. Default true.

layout.description: Layout for the navigation controls. 'default' = side-by-side grid (back-left / stepper-center / next-right); rows with a single visible button collapse to full-width. 'centered' = stepper on its own row above, buttons centered as a group below. 'inline-full' = stepper on its own row above, buttons side-by-side at 50% width each (or full-width solo). 'stacked' = stepper, then Back, then Next, stacked vertically at full-width.

showStepper.description: Show the step indicator dots in the controls bar. Default true.

stepperStyle.description: Style of the step indicator. 'default' = use the form style's default stepper. 'dots' = standard circles, scale on active. 'pill' = active dot stretches to pill shape. 'glow' = active dot gets a glow ring. 'bar' = track + counter (hides dots). 'text' = 'Step X of Y' text above screen content. Default 'default'.

ConfirmationConfig.description: Terminal 'thank you' / confirmation screen shown after the flow is submitted. Presentation-only, so it lives on the config rather than as a Screen. Renders only when 'show' is not false and 'title' or 'body' has content (or the parent supplies an override via the onFlowComplete return value).

show.description: Explicit off-switch. Content presence is the positive gate.

title.description: Heading text. Supports ${...} reference markup and text formatting.

body.description: Body text. Supports ${...} reference markup and text formatting.

mode.description: Form presentation mode. 'standard' = multi-field screens (default). 'conversational' = one-question-per-screen, vertically centered, with auto-advance on selection, Enter-to-advance on text inputs, and animated component entry.

summary.description: Show a summary screen before completion.

FlowScreen.description: A single screen (page) in the flow.

label.description: Display label for the screen, shown in navigation.

nextButtonLabel.description: Custom label for the Next/Done navigation button on this screen. Overrides the default text.

backButtonLabel.description: Custom label for the Back navigation button on this screen. Overrides the default text.

valid.description: Runtime validity state. Do not set in authored JSON.

type.description: Component type key. Acts as the discriminator on the TS-side Component union; narrowing on this value types `properties` to the matching Component*Properties variant.

properties.description: Type-specific properties. JSON schema is the open ComponentProperties shape below; TypeScript narrows it per-type via the variant map in types/src/component-variants.ts.

components.description: Child component templates. Used by 'group' and 'repeater' types.

value.description: Current value. Typically set at runtime, not in authored JSON.

addedComponents.description: Runtime group/repeater iterations. Do not set in authored JSON.

valid.description: Runtime validity state. Do not set in authored JSON.

display.description: Runtime display overrides. Do not set in authored JSON.

ComponentProperties.description: Properties vary by component type. Common fields documented here; type-specific fields below.

value.description: Static content value (used by display components: header, text, divider).

displayType.description: When true on a 'text' component, renders as display-only (no input).

required.description: Whether the field must have a value to pass validation.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown when the field is empty.

helperText.description: Instructional text displayed below the field.

tooltip.description: Tooltip text shown on hover/focus of an info icon.

detail.description: Rich text displayed above the component. Supports markup ([b], [i], [l]). When set, hides the label unless showLabel is true.

regex.description: Regular expression pattern for input validation.

maxlength.description: Maximum character length for text inputs.

startAdornment.description: Text or symbol displayed at the start of the input field (e.g. '$', '+1').

options.description: Available choices for selection components (dropDown, dropDownMulti, checkbox, radio, cardSelect).

min.description: Minimum value. Number for slider and inputNumber. String for date/time types: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD), relative expression (today, today+7, today-3), or time (HH:MM). For inputNumber, sets the HTML min attribute and clamps value on blur.

max.description: Maximum value. Number for slider/rating and inputNumber. String for date/time types: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD), relative expression (today, today+7, today-3), or time (HH:MM). For inputNumber, sets the HTML max attribute and clamps value on blur.

precision.description: Rating precision (e.g. 0.5 for half-stars, 1 for whole stars).

maxSize.description: Maximum file size in bytes for fileUpload.

width.description: Component width for flow-based layout. Components flow left-to-right and wrap naturally. Absent/undefined means full width.

showLabel.description: Show the component label even when detail text is set. For groups/repeaters, shows the label as a visible header.

collapsible.description: Allow the group or repeater to be collapsed/expanded.

showBorder.description: Draw the container border/frame around the group or repeater.

minIterations.description: Minimum number of repeater iterations. Also determines initial row count when no initialData is provided. Default 1.

initialData.description: Pre-populated data for repeater iterations. Each element is an object mapping template child UUIDs to initial values.

mode.description: Signature component mode: draw (canvas), type (text in script font), or both (toggle).

inputType.description: HTML input type hint for inputText. Controls mobile keyboard behavior and input masking.

readOnly.description: When true, the field is non-editable with a muted background. Applies to inputText, inputTextArea, inputNumber, dropDown, dropDownMulti, radio, checkbox, slider, date, time, and dateTime.

autocomplete.description: HTML autocomplete attribute value for browser autofill (e.g. 'email', 'tel', 'given-name'). Applies to inputText, inputTextArea, and inputNumber.

showPasswordToggle.description: When true and inputType is 'password', shows an eye icon to toggle password visibility. Applies to inputText.

columns.description: For cardSelect: number of columns in the card grid (integer, default 2). For table: array of column definitions.

placeholderStart.description: Placeholder text for the start field in range components (dateRange, timeRange, dateTimeRange).

placeholderEnd.description: Placeholder text for the end field in range components (dateRange, timeRange, dateTimeRange).

step.description: Minute interval for time-related components (time, dateTime, timeRange, dateTimeRange). Default 15.

dateFormat.description: Display format for dates. Applies to date, dateTime, dateRange, dateTimeRange. Default MM/DD/YYYY.

minTime.description: Minimum allowed time (HH:MM, 24h) for dateTime and dateTimeRange. Enforced independently from min date.

maxTime.description: Maximum allowed time (HH:MM, 24h) for dateTime and dateTimeRange. Enforced independently from max date.

swatches.description: Preset color swatches for the colorPicker component.

defaultValue.description: Pre-selected initial value. For colorPicker: hex color (e.g. '#FF0000'). For yesNo: 'yes' or 'no'. For radio, cardSelect, dropDown: the option value to pre-select. Ignored when no option matches; without it these components start at null (no default-to-first-option behavior).

labelYes.description: Custom label for the 'Yes' button in yesNo component. Defaults to 'Yes'.

labelNo.description: Custom label for the 'No' button in yesNo component. Defaults to 'No'.

layout.description: Button layout direction for yesNo component. 'horizontal' keeps buttons side-by-side (even on small screens), 'vertical' stacks them. Defaults to responsive (horizontal on wide, vertical on narrow).

title.description: Title text for the callout component, displayed as a bold header line.

variant.description: Visual variant for the callout component.

icon.description: Icon key for the callout or rating component. Callout icons: info, check, warning, question, lightbulb, megaphone, bell, shield, lock, heart, flag, bookmark, zap, pencil, star, none. Rating icons: star, heart, thumbsUp, circle, diamond. Falls back to variant default (callout) or star (rating) if omitted.

rows.description: Table rows. Each row has a label and an array of cell values matching the columns.

highlightColumn.description: 1-based column number to visually highlight (0 = none).

formula.description: Formula expression for computed components. References other fields via {uuid} syntax. Supports +, -, *, /, SUM(), COUNT(), AVG(), MIN(), MAX() (aggregation and scalar), IF(cond, then, else), comparison operators (>, <, >=, <=, ==, !=), and .selectedOption.metadata.key.

format.description: Display format for computed components and calculations.

decimalPlaces.description: Number of decimal places (0-10). On inputNumber: restricts input via keystroke filtering; on computed/calculations: display precision.

currencySymbol.description: Currency symbol prepended to value when format is 'currency'. Defaults to '$'.

FlowValidationConfig.description: Validation configuration for a component. Contains an array of validation rules.

rules.description: Ordered list of validation rules to evaluate.

params.description: Type-specific parameters (e.g. { min: 3 } for minLength, { regex: '...' } for pattern, { field: 'uuid' } for matchesField).

message.description: Optional custom error message. When omitted, a default message is used.

Option.description: A selectable option for dropdown, radio, or checkbox components.

value.description: Value stored when the option is selected.

metadata.description: Optional structured metadata for the option (e.g. price, weight, unit). Keys are strings; values are strings, numbers, or booleans. Consumed by the calculations engine.

FlowConditionConfig.description: Condition configuration for conditionally showing or hiding a component or screen.

action.description: 'show' = visible when condition is met; 'hide' = hidden when condition is met.

ConditionGroup.description: A group of condition rules evaluated with AND or OR logic.

logic.description: 'and' = all rules must match; 'or' = any rule matches.

rules.description: One or more condition rules to evaluate.

CardSelectOption.description: An option card for the cardSelect component.

value.description: Value stored when this card is selected.

description.description: Short description text below the title.

title.description: Heading text displayed prominently on the card.

features.description: List of feature strings displayed as a checklist.

badge.description: Badge text shown as a pill above the card (e.g. 'Popular').

TableColumn.description: A column definition for the table display component.

TableRow.description: A row definition for the table display component.

label.description: Row header label shown in the first column.

values.description: Cell values for each column, in order.

ConditionRule.description: A single condition rule comparing a source component's value using an operator.

source.description: UUID of the source component whose value is tested, or a context key when sourceType is 'context'.

sourceType.description: Where to resolve the source value. 'component' (default) looks up a component UUID. 'context' looks up a key in FBRE's external context prop.

value.description: Comparison value. Omitted for unary operators (isEmpty, isNotEmpty, isTrue, isFalse). Arrays for set operators (isOneOf, isNotOneOf, includesAny, includesAll, includesNone).

CalculationFormat.description: Display format for a calculation result.

FlowCalculation.description: A named formula that computes a value from component values, option metadata, and other calculations. Supports arithmetic (+, -, *, /), comparison operators (>, <, >=, <=, ==, !=), parentheses, field references ({uuid}), option metadata ({uuid}.selectedOption.metadata.key), aggregation functions (SUM, COUNT, AVG, MIN, MAX) over repeater iterations, scalar MIN/MAX with multiple arguments, and IF(condition, then, else) conditionals.

label.description: Human-readable label displayed in the builder UI and available for reference markup.

formula.description: The formula expression. References use {uuid} syntax. Supports: arithmetic (+, -, *, /), parentheses, numeric literals, {uuid}.selectedOption.metadata.key for option metadata, SUM({uuid})/COUNT({uuid})/AVG({uuid}) for repeater aggregation.

decimalPlaces.description: Number of decimal places for display formatting.

currencySymbol.description: Currency symbol prepended to the result when format is 'currency'. Defaults to '$'.
